response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience in software development leadership, IT architecture, and team management, with a strong background in open-source technologies and Linux environments. His leadership roles at multiple companies, including founding and scaling an open-source GIS platform, highlight strategic and technical expertise. While his German proficiency is currently 'Basic' (A2 level per resume), his communication skills in English and willingness to learn new technologies offset this concern. His diverse technical stack and project experience align well with the role's requirements.
strengths: Extensive leadership experience in senior software development roles across multiple companies
Strong background in open-source technologies, Linux, and architectural design (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven track record in mentoring teams and implementing modern software practices (TDD, CI/CD, microservices)
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic' (below the required C1 level)
Current employment status shows a recent career gap (October 2025–Present), which may require clarification
No direct experience with UML modeling mentioned, though architecture design is a key responsibility
